input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

final_answer: rule S.2.7.3: Presentation Judging Score Sheet – available at the FSAE Online website.
